subject: [DCAEGEN2] Update CMPv2 certs usage in dcaegen2-services
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Update CMPv2 certs usage in dcaegen2-services

Updates:
- Add microservice specific flag to determine if CMPv2
should be used
- Add function to check if CMPv2 parts should be included

Signed-off-by: Remigiusz Janeczek <remigiusz.janeczek@nokia.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2630
Change-Id: If81c50c6029aafef40fa91c5295ad8ad24f953d3

all HC and smoke tests OK except DCAE HC..which is a bit annoying for a DCAE patch
the HC is failing because DCAE deployment failed, which is strange as it seems OK https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//121463-2/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/kubernetes-status/pod-onap-dcae-dashboard-695ff85589-bd4sv.html from a log perspective
but 500 received from the readiness probe

Warning 	1 	Unhealthy 	Readiness probe failed: Get "https://10.233.74.99:8443/ccsdk-app/health": net/http: request canceled (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)
Warning 	5 	Unhealthy 	Readiness probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 500

It seems to be failing the same way in other patches also, not sure why. It is not related, patch affects dcaegen2-services chart, while dashboard comes from dcaegen2 chart (there are no dependencies from dcaegen2 to dcaegen2-services), but let's recheck
